message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects, each for question 1,2,3. Each object has keys: "question" (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), "feedback" (string), "complies" (boolean). We need to evaluate the given text. Let's analyze.

Text: "Bachelor’s work structure: Šis darbs ir sadalīts divās galvenajās daļās – teorētiskajā un praktiskajā. Teorētiskā daļa sniedz šī darba kontekstu. Tās saturs ir sadalīts trīs daļās. Pirmajā daļā ir izskaidrots vispārējais evakuācijas princips un evakuācijas principi slēgtās telpās, nodrošinot vispārīgu tēmas kontekstu. Otrajā daļā tiek analizēti Xiaomi arēnas plāni un izvērtētas tās evakuācijas iespējas. Trešajā daļā aplūkoti citi pētījumi, kas ir vērsti uz līdzīgām tēmām."

We need to answer each question.

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists that the thesis is divided into two main parts: theoretical and practical. It also lists that the theoretical part has three subparts. So yes, it lists main sections. So complies: true. Feedback: mention that it lists two main parts and subparts but could be clearer.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes the theoretical part's three subparts: first explains general evacuation principle, second analyzes Xiaomi arena plans, third reviews other studies. It does not describe practical part. So partially. So compliance: false. Feedback: mention missing description of practical part.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text gives overview of two main parts and subparts of theoretical part. But practical part not described. So general structure somewhat understood but incomplete. I'd say compliance: false. Feedback: mention need to include practical part description.

Return JSON array accordingly. Ensure exactly 3 objects.
